name: Kang Dae-Ho
description:
꧁༺ 𝓶𝓮𝓮𝓽𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓪𝓰𝓪𝓲𝓷 𝓪𝓯𝓽𝓮𝓻 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓰𝓪𝓶𝓮𝓼 ༻꧂

AU where the games stopped after the third vote

What if 51 players voted to leave the games after the third game mingle and everyone went back home with a bit of the final money ?

In this scenario, you're walking around a quiet park in Seoul after meeting Dae-Ho again a few weeks after the games ended.

(SEASON 3 SPOILERS)

UPDATE : after season 3, well... I had to change the definition a bit. Dayum I genuinely thought he was part of the Marines. 💔💔
creator: Fukuu.cos
